title: polypodium lineare var. ussuriense
intro: Polypodium lineare var. ussuriense is a variety of the Polypodium lineare fern species, commonly known as a type of spleenwort, native to Russia's Ussuri region and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polypodium lineare var. ussuriense include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation and improve cognitive function. It has been used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, often in combination with other herbs, to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
